## Summary

- what changed
- why this change exists

## Related

- closes #
- discussion:

## Validation

- [ ] `cargo test --features switcher-unit-tests`
- [ ] additional smoke checks:

## Risk

- user-facing behavior affected:
- auth or token handling touched:
- migration or compatibility concern:

## Checklist

- [ ] docs updated where behavior changed
- [ ] no secrets, tokens, or callback URLs were committed
- [ ] tests or rationale for missing tests included
- [ ] labels and issue links are set appropriately
